utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , okay let leave these two alone .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! I do not care what my hormones are doing , I am not going to just do it with some random guy !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Fine ! Then you tell Roger because he was really looking forward to this !

emotion_cause.span: 2_I do not care what my hormones are doing , I am not going to just do it with some random guy !
